title: That Is Enough to Begin With
caption: Mr. Chen did not deliver a lecture. He gave a lesson. He pulled more seeds from his pocket -- sixty years of careful saving -- and handed them to Dev. By the time he was finished, there was a proper raised bed plan sketched on the back of Chloe's notebook. Dev stood holding the seeds in both hands, overwhelmed. 'Why are you being so kind to me?' 'Because you tried. That is enough to begin with.'
story_notes: Forgiveness and mentorship. Mr. Chen gives Dev more seeds and a proper garden plan. The case resolves not with punishment but with grace.
